lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: nei5 hou2! hou2 noi6 mou5 gin3!

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: hai6 aa3! nei5 zeoi3 gan6 dim2 aa3?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: hou2 ho2, nei5 ne1?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: ngo5 dou1 hai6 hou2 ho2.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: nei5 sik1 m4 sik1 gong2 jing1 man2?
lines.english: Do you know how to speak English?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: siu2 siu2 laa1.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, ci4 di1 gin3!

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: baai1 baai3!

title: DIALOGUE 2: Ordering Food at a Cha Chaan Teng (Tea Restaurant)

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1! ngo5 soeng2 dim2 caan1.
lines.english: Excuse me! I'd like to order.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: lei5 soeng2 sik6 me1 je5?
lines.english: What would you like to eat?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: jat1 bui1 jit6 naai5 caa4, m4 goi1.
lines.english: One cup of hot milk tea, please.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: siu2 tim1? siu2 bing1?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, siu2 tim1, m4 jiu3 lau4.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: hou2, hai6 m4 hai6 ji1 go3?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: hai6 aa3, gei2 cin2 aa6?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: saam1 sap6 gau2 man1.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, ngo5 daa2 baau1.
lines.english: Thanks, I'll take it to go.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 hou2 ji3 si1, hai2 bin1 dou6 hai6 MTR?
lines.english: Excuse me, where is the MTR?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: zik1 zau2, sau2 zau2, hai2 go3 go3 zau6 hai6.
lines.english: Go straight, turn left, it's over there.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: gei2 yun4 aa3?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 hai6 hou2 yun4, saai3 zau2, 5 fan1 zung1.
lines.english: Not very far, walk straight, 5 minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1 saai3!

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 sai2 haak3 hei3, ci4 di1 gin3.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, ji1 go3 gei2 cin2 aa6?
lines.english: Excuse me, how much is this one?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: saam1 baak3 man1.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: waa6, gam3 gwai3! peng4 di1 laa1!

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 ho2 ji3 si1, ji1 hai6 zeoi3 peng4 gaa3 laa3.
lines.english: Sorry, this is the cheapest already.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: jau5 mou5 zit3 aa6?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, m4 ho2 ji3 si1, m4 hai6 hou2 ji3 si1.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1 saai3, ngo5 ling6 waan2 gau3 sin1.
lines.english: Thank you, I'll look around first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, gau3 ming6 aa3! ngo5 sat1 zo2 aa3!

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: dim2 gaai2? nei5 hai2 bin1 dou6 aa3?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: ngo5 m4 sik1 gong2 jing1 man2.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 gan2, hai2 bin1 dou6 nei5 zeoi3 gan6?
lines.english: Don't worry, where are you right now?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: ngo5 hai2 ding3 nei6 gung1 jyun2 gan1 ceng4.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, deng2 deng2, ngo5 lai4 wan2 nei5.
lines.english: Wait a moment, I'll come find you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: do1 ze6 saai3!

title: DIALOGUE 6: At a Cafe / Casual Hangout

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: nei5 soeng2 jam2 me1 je5?
lines.english: What would you like to drink?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: jat1 bui1 beng2 caa4, siu2 tim1, m4 goi1.
lines.english: One iced milk tea, less sugar please.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: ngo5 jiu3 jat1 bui1 kei4 ze2 lai4.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: hou2 ci4 aa3! hai2 ni1 dou6 hou2 leng3!

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: hai6 aa3, hou2 noi6 mou5 gin3?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: hai6 aa3, ne1 ci3 ngo5 maai4 daan1.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1 saai3, haa3 ci3 gin3!
lines.english: Thank you so much, see you next time!

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, hou2 noi6 dang2!
lines.english: Excuse me, sorry for the long wait!

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 sai2 haak3 hei3, heoi3 bin1 dou6 aa3?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, heoi3 Mong4 Gok2, hou2 mang4?
lines.english: Please go to Mong Kok, is it far?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 hai6 hou2 yun4, saai3 zau2 sap6 fan1 zung1.
lines.english: Not very far, straight for 10 minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1 saai3.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, hai2 cin4 bin1 zau6 hai6 Tsim4 Saai2 Tsui2.
lines.english: Please, ahead is Tsim Sha Tsui.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: zik1 zau2, sau2 zau2, hai2 go3 go3 ting4?
lines.english: Go straight, turn left, stop over there?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: hai6 aa3, hai2 ni1 dou6 ting4, m4 goi1.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: hou2, gei2 cin2 aa6?

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: sei3 sap6 ng5 man1.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: ni1 hai6 cin2, m4 goi1, ci4 di1 gin3.
lines.english: Here's the money, thanks, see you later.

title: DIALOGUE 3: Asking the driver to wait

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, ho2 m4 ho2 ji3 dang2 ngo5 jat1 zan2?
lines.english: Excuse me, can you wait for me a moment?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: hou2 aa3, dan6 hai6 m4 hou2 taai3 noi6 aa3.
lines.english: Okay, but don't be too long.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1 saai3, ngo5 hai6 faai3 faai3.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 gan2, ngo5 hai2 ni1 dou6 dang2 nei5.
lines.english: No rush, I'll wait here for you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, hai2 bin1 dou6 haa2 ce1?
lines.english: Excuse me, where can I get out?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 ho2 ji3 si1, hou2 noi6 caa1, coeng4 cou2 gan2.
lines.english: Sorry, heavy traffic, it's rush hour.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: m4 gan2, ngo5 m4 gan2 si4 gan3.
lines.english: No rush, I'm not in a hurry.

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: m4 goi1, hai2 ni1 dou6 haa2 ce1 laa1.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: hou2, gei2 do1 cin2 aa3?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: baat3 sap6 man1, m4 goi1.
